channel.title: Family on jqknono Blogs
channel.description: Recent content in Family on jqknono Blogs

item.title: Turned Off Mom's Douyin Personalized Recommendations
item.author: https://blog.jqknono.com (jqknono)
item.description: A family essay about helping my mother turn off Douyin’s personalized recommendation feature, documenting the subtle moments of intergenerational care in the digital age.
